intended_use: CINA is a radiological computer aided triage and notification software indicated for use in the analysis of (1) non-enhanced head CT images and (2) CT angiographies of the head. The device is intended
intended_use_full: CINA is a radiological computer aided triage and notification software indicated for use in the analysis of (1) non-enhanced head CT images and (2) CT angiographies of the head. The device is intended to assist hospital networks and trained radiologists in workflow triage by flagging and communicating suspected positive findings of (1) head CT images for Intracranial Hemorrhage (ICH) and (2) CT angiographies of the head for large vessel occlusion (LVO).
target_condition: Intracranial Hemorrhage (ICH) and Large Vessel Occlusion (LVO)
ground_truth: Concurrence of three US board-certified neuroradiologist readers
other_metrics: Time-to-notification: ICH mean 21.6 ± 4.4 seconds (median 20.4 seconds); LVO mean 34.7 ± 10.7 seconds (median 33.4 seconds)
